# Ravi Both — Portfolio

> Full-Stack Engineer & Tech Consultant based in Peterborough, NH.

## About

Ravi Both is a full-stack software engineer with an MBA in Business Process Improvement. He builds scalable web applications and provides technical consulting for growing businesses. Fluent in English and Dutch, proficient in German.

## Skills

- Frontend: React, Next.js, Svelte, Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, AWS, RESTful APIs, DynamoDB
- Mobile: React Native (iOS & Android)
- Tools: Docker, CircleCI, Git, Figma, Storybook, Prismic CMS
- Testing: Cypress, Jest, Vitest, Sentry

## Selected Projects

- TM.org Course Platform: Full-stack booking platform connecting students with meditation teachers across the US and UK. Built from scratch with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS.
- TM App: React Native mobile app for Android and iOS, supporting meditation practice with guided sessions and event discovery.
- Brain Innovation Technologies: Sales funnel redesign for a B2B wellness site targeting executives, HR, and educational organisations. Built with Astro, Svelte, and Tailwind CSS.
- BaanSearch: Job search link aggregator generating pre-built search URLs to 60+ job boards with a single set of filters.
- Claude Code Usage Monitor: Desktop utility tracking Claude Code usage limits with system tray integration, dashboard, and alerts.
